summary: CPR Page redesign testing completed successfully. Full visual flowchart with cards and arrows verified. All features working: CPR tab shows complete algorithm, H's & T's always visible, drug calculations with weight, Recording tab with timer, long-press Rx for drug selection, event logging with timestamps.

cpr_tab_flowchart: Step 1 shows full CPR info (Rate 100-120/min, Depth 1/3 AP, C:V 15:2, CPR fraction >60%)
Step 2 shows 'Check Rhythm - Shockable?' decision point
Visual flowchart with arrows connecting steps
Flow boxes with color-coded borders (red, blue, amber, green)
vf_pvt_shockable_pathway: Shock steps with 2 J/kg and 4 J/kg doses
asystole_pea_pathway: CPR 2 min with IV/IO access step
hs_and_ts_always_visible: H's section: Hypoxia, Hypovolemia, H+ (Acidosis), Hypo/Hyperkalemia, Hypothermia, Hypoglycemia
T's section: Tension pneumothorax, Tamponade, Toxins, Thrombosis (PE), Thrombosis (coronary)
Not collapsed - visible on CPR tab without clicking
drug_calculations: Weight input field accepts numeric input
Drug Doses Reference section expands to show all PALS drugs
drug_doses_reference: Epinephrine (1:10,000) with IV/IO and ETT doses
recording_tab: Timer displays 00:00 initially with 'Ready to start'
Start button begins timer, changes to Pause
Reset button clears timer and events
event_recording: Pulse button records event with timestamp
Rx button records event with timestamp (short press)
Shock button records event with timestamp
Event Log shows all events with elapsed time and wall clock time
long_press_rx_drug_selection: Long-press (600ms+) on Rx opens drug selection modal
Modal shows 'Select Drug' header with close button
Four drug options: Epinephrine, Adenosine, Amiodarone, NaHCO3
Selecting drug records Rx event with drug name in parentheses
two_tabs: CPR tab shows full flowchart algorithm
Recording tab shows timer and event buttons
Both tabs clickable and switch content correctly

critical_code_review_comments: CPRPage.jsx at 759 lines is well-structured with clear component separation
FlowBox and FlowArrow components create visual flowchart correctly
HsAndTs component renders outside collapsible section - always visible as required
Long-press handler uses setTimeout with 500ms threshold for drug menu
2-minute pulse check reminder implemented with showReminder state and timer logic
All drug calculations follow PALS 2025 dosing formulas
context_for_next_testing_agent: CPR page has been completely redesigned with full visual flowchart (not step-by-step slides). CPR tab shows flowchart with VF/pVT and Asystole/PEA expandable pathways. H's & T's are always visible. Recording tab has timer with long-press Rx to select drugs. All features verified working. Navigate: Login -> Children -> CPR. Use mobile viewport 390x844.

features_verified.full_visual_flowchart_with_arrows: PASS - Step 1, Step 2, branch buttons, arrows connecting elements
features_verified.step1_full_cpr_info: PASS - Rate 100-120, Depth 1/3 AP, C:V 15:2, CPR fraction >60%
features_verified.vf_pvt_expands_full_pathway: PASS - Shows shock doses, Epi, Amiodarone steps
features_verified.asystole_pea_expands_full_pathway: PASS - Shows CPR, Epi ASAP, treat reversible causes
features_verified.hs_and_ts_always_visible: PASS - Not collapsed, shows all H's and T's
features_verified.drug_calculations_with_weight: PASS - All calculations correct for 15kg test
features_verified.drug_doses_reference_all_pals_drugs: PASS - 9 drug categories with proper dosing
features_verified.long_press_rx_drug_modal: PASS - Shows 4 drug options after 600ms hold
features_verified.selected_drug_in_event_log: PASS - Drug name appears in parentheses
